args: echo '[container] PID 1 alive; attempting unshare -U (BPF-LSM block mode should DENY)'; if /bin/busybox unshare -U /bin/busybox echo USERNS-CREATED-MARKER-FAIL; then echo '[container] unshare SUCCEEDED - BPF-LSM did NOT block (FAIL)'; else echo '[container] unshare(CLONE_NEWUSER) DENIED by BPF-LSM (EPERM); container STILL RUNNING (blocked, not killed)'; fi; echo '[container] entrypoint finished normally (survived the blocked escape)'
